title: マルゼンスキーの大切なもの

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer. I want you to come somewhere with me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer. I want you to come somewhere with me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Are you free tonight?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky brings me to the beach late at night.
There appears to be a haunted trail event
happening.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
One of the younger students told me about
this! ♪ It's booming with all the hip young'uns!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rules are simple—reach the goal at the
shoreline. The better you place, the better your
prize.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
First place gets a chance to turn anything they
want into a figurine?! Does that mean I could
make one of Tata?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh! I absolutely must have one on my
dashboard!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, the haunted trail begins!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, that spooked me... Hey, this is just konjac
jelly! Geez Louise!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you get a bit of a scare, but this is good
fun! Come on, there's still more to go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Usually she plays the role of everyone's trusty big
sister, so it's a little rare to see her acting more
her age. We press on, sticking close to each
other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Eek?!
Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A teary-eyed Sweep Tosho jumps out from a
stack of driftwood.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-wha... Maruzen?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Sweep Pea! Oh dear, are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her playful demeanor all about disappears as she
quickly snaps back into big sister mode.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine, okay?! Me and Rob Roy accidentally split up, that's all...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I may be fine all by myself, but Rob Roy's a big
baby, so she's probably off crying somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho's eyes gradually well with tears.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer. Can we try winning some other time?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer. Can we try winning some other time?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks a bunch! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry, Sweep Pea. Let's find Robby Roy
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky walks with her hand-in-hand,
matching her pace. That's the reliable Maruzensky
everyone knows.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's a straight path all the way to the finish line,
and we haven't seen her yet, so she's totes up
ahead.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hm, but it's quite dark around these parts, and
the path's a little wide. There's a chance we just
haven't noticed her.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Where could she be? Trainer, what do you think?
choice_data_list: Let's go to the finish line.
Let's head back to the start line.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Where could she be? Trainer, what do you think?
choice_data_list: Let's go to the finish line.
Let's head back to the start line.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Right, we should first try reaching the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We walk for a while until eventually we reach a
clearing that resembles a finish line.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm... Is Robby Roy somewhere around here?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh! There you are, Sweep! ...Maruzen! You're here
too?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh?! So, Robby Roy was here with you this whole
time!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's right. We just happened to cross paths. At
any rate, I'm glad you found Sweep safe and
sound.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What gives, Rob Roy? Why'd you run away like
that?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sorry! I-I thought that you were right behind me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now now, aren't you glad you're back together
now? Let bygones be bygones!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph, whatever! It's not like I'm upset or
anything. Just... don't worry me again.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Sweep. You too, Maruzen.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right. You can have this if you'd like...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy offers up the winning prize for the
haunted trail contest.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um... I ended up winning because I was so
focused on running.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you for finding Sweep for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky beams at the sight of Zenno Rob Roy
timidly passing her the coupon.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...I appreciate the offer, but why not claim your
prize and use it with Sweep Pea?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'd appreciate it a lot more if you two would let
me know what amazing figurine you end up
making! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
For instance... you could make a character from a
storybook, Robby Roy!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And Sweep Pea, I think you would love making
your favorite familiar or wand.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But... well, um, sorry... and th-thank you very
much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I spot Maruzensky warmly watching
over Sweep Tosho and Zenno Rob Roy as they
chat about figurine ideas.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okey-dokey! Let's go back where we started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We walk for a while, until eventually we find
ourselves back at the starting line. There we see...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's Sweep! Tickezo, I found Sweep!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ooohhh! I'm shoo glad! We were shoo shoo
wurrieed!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: H-huh? What are you two doing here?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, we met up with Rob Roy at the finish line,
and she told us what happened!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet said she'd watch Rob Roy, so we came
looking for you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So that's the sitch! Good thing she's with Scarlet!
What a relief!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Th-that wasn't me! I'm not the slightest bit
hungry...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now that my nerves are out of the way, I'm
starting to get hungry too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I think I saw a milkshake stand down at the
finish line!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
How lovely. ♪ Now that things have calmed
down, let's all go grab some shakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We regroup at the finish line and make our way to
the milkshake stand. However...

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk A (Man)
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, but I only have enough to make six
more. I'm afraid someone will have to miss out...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's fine, we'll take the six! I don't need to
have one.
choice_data_list: Would you like half of mine?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, sure thing. Thanks, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, sure thing. Thanks, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, we sip and savor the milkshakes under
a starry sky and listen to the sound of the waves.
